item.title: 2017 Nissan GTR R35 v1.58 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 8, 2026

2017 Nissan GTR R35 v1.58 ETS2

– HQ Model
– HQ Salon
– Ao (Ambiyans Coating)
– 4 Different Front Bumpers
– 4 Different Rear Bumpers
– 4 Different Cup Attachments
– 2 Different Spoilers
– 4 Different Wheels
– 3 Different Seat Covers
– 3 Different Steering Wheel Covers

Update for v1.58

Credits: Mert İrşi Sound: Nimit

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Mercedes Maybach S650 1.58x ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 8, 2026

Mercedes Maybach S650 1.58x ETS2

– 5 Different subfloor coverings
– 5 Different seat covers
– 5 Different cockpit coverings
– 5 Different ceiling coverings
– 5 Different steering wheel coverings
– 2 Different shutter flashes
– 2 Different glass flashlights
– 2 Different Logo
– 5 Different cabin lighting
– 11 Different people
– 2 Different bonnets
– 6 Different neon lighting
– 1 The roller shutter logo
– 2 Different number plates
– 2 Different smell animations
– Animated flag animation
– 8 Different Wheels

– HQ Model
– HQ İnterior
– Real Sound
– Flashes(O)
– Siren sound (N)
– Movable coffee table with a right window

Update for v1.58

Credits: Mert İrşi Sound: Nimit

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Sound Fixes Pack v26.14 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 8, 2026

Sound Fixes Pack v26.14 ETS2

Changelog v26.14
– Added exterior perspective open door sound for the cutscene for newly purchased trucks (adjustable by UI sounds volume).
– Added peeling of protective plastic film sound effect for the cutscene for newly purchased trucks (adjustable by UI sounds volume).
– 1 new sound effect variation for disconnecting the air lines from the trailer.
– Reworked the cranking sounds for lowering and raising a trailer’s landing gear.
– 1 new sound effect variation for the default/fallback electric window sound replacement when it stops movement.
– Slight increase in sound volume for the default/fallback electric window sound replacement when it stops movement.
– 1 new interior perspective open door sound effect variation, courtesy of Max2712.
– 1 new interior suspension sound effect variation.
– 1 new sound variation for the seatbelt click for after refueling.
– 1 new sound variation for the key in ignition sound effect for after refueling.
– 2 new door close sound effect variations for after refueling. [ETS2 edition]
– Implemented more engine sound effects for the 2014 DAF XF 106 (PACCAR MX-13 configuration) sound set in AI traffic. [ETS2 edition]
– 2 new air brake sound effect variations for the 2014 DAF XF 106 (PACCAR MX-13 configuration) in AI traffic. [ETS2 edition]
– Reworked the jackhammer drilling sounds with a longer sound effect and more accurate sound volume. [ETS2 edition]
– Reduced bass at far distance for the Luhanskteplovoz M62 train locomotive engine sound set. [ETS2 edition]
– Added entry for the sound effects for the cutscene after buying a new truck to the recommended audio settings information text file.

The mod features meticulously crafted sounds, covering the following:
Suspension and tire bump sounds for your truck and trailer.
Fuel / filling station sounds.
The door closed and the seatbelt sounds after refueling.
Train sound enhancements for several locomotives and railroad cars.
Country/state-specific railroad crossing bell sounds.
The most complete tire sound package for all terrains: asphalt, gravel, grass, snow, and sleeper lines.
Wet tire sound for the player’s truck tires when the asphalt roads are wet.
Reworked tire screech/skid sound effects.
Nokia phone ringtone sound replaces the hurry up / late music, leading to less stress for the player.
Default common sound reworks, such as improved default air brake sounds.
AI traffic vehicle sound improvements, with engine and horn sounds uniquely set for hundreds of specific vehicles.
(ETS2 only) Several countries supported with local police siren sounds.
English AU/UK/US voice navigation variants with speaker effect added and uncustomary phrases removed.
Wind buffeting and rush of air sounds at high speeds only when the window is open.
More environmental and ambient sounds, and tasteful changes to existing ambient sounds in the game world.
Trailer coupling, trailer brace rotation, and trailer sliding axle sounds.
Extended sound sequence for the uncoupling of semi-trailers.
8 standalone air horns.
Dynamic rain sounds, and an assortment of different thunder sounds with delay.
Default gear grinding sound effect additions and improvements.
Enhanced reverb zones, including stronger reverb when under bridges and overpasses.
(ATS only) Drawbridge lift warning sound for the Columbia River Interstate Bridge.
(ATS only) Working sounds for the Musical Road on the Historic Route 66.
(Optional) Reefer / refrigerated trailer sound functionality.
(Optional – ATS only) Cop scouting reports via CB radio (enable in voice navigation options).
Fixes for World Ambient sound glitches from the vanilla game and/or mods.
A couple of UI sound replacements in the Driving Academy module.

For further immersion, the mod may also include official paint colors and more authentic specifications for each AI traffic vehicle it modifies for sound. Rarer paint colors are less likely to be seen.

Compatibility
ETS2 1.58.1 No errors in game log. Must have high priority in Mod Manager.
Does not replace individual player truck sounds, so this mod can be used with an unlimited amount of truck sound mods of your choice.
Compatible with all maps and all trucks, including truck mods.
Supported in single-player and multiplayer Convoy mode, and is marked as an optional mod in Convoy.
Minimum requirements

Requires higher priority in Mod Manager than:
Any rain sound mods
Any AI traffic-related mods
Any map mods (e.g., ProMods)

Credits: Drive Safely

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Sakha Add-On v1.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 8, 2026

Sakha Add-On v1.0 ETS2

Features:

Cities
Khara-Tumul
Bereg-Yurdya
Yuchyuguey
Kuydisun

Roads : New part of 98N-002
Compatibility: Actually for 1.58 and FER Alpha 30 Fix 2

Credits: Aduskaaaa, Najito, Kiri, Damon

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

item.title: RoExtended – Donbass Map – ProMods – Project Chernozemye – Project Russia Connector v1.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 8, 2026

RoExtended – Donbass Map – ProMods – Project Chernozemye – Project Russia Connector v1.0 ETS2

Connects RoExtended with Donbass Map, ProMods, Project Chernozemye and Project Russia

Required mods:
RoExtended
Donbass Map
ProMods
Project Chernozemye
Project Russia

Credits: hi sora

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.
